name: Claude&Codex
description:
A multi-agent development workflow that automates software delivery through three phases:

1. Planning — A Brainstormer agent collaborates with a technical validator (SubBSM) to refine user requirements into an approved master plan, then breaks it down into epics and tasks.
2. Execution — A Coder agent implements tasks while an Epic Manager reviews and controls the flow—approving, revising, or flagging issues until all work is complete.
3. Code Review — A Code Reviewer audits the completed work against architectural standards, generating findings that feed back into new remediation tasks if needed.
